title: Feather Boots
description: Adds boots that give slowfalling into the game.
body:
Not to be confused with feather falling boots!

Tired of having to always carry around a water bucket to save yourself from falling?
Well, worry no more!

This mod adds boots crafted with feathers to grant you slowfalling!
Current boots are **Chainmail**, **Gold**, **Iron**, **Diamond**, **Netherite**

I would like to add modded armor support but sadly i do not know how to.


You are free to use this in a modpack. But please do not use the code as your own.
